/AJW/CH1:SP5Y:U:ESS:PROB 3 Y:PJ309D/CTS:309/DNACOMP/STATES/CTORD:DEFENDANTTO PAY RESTITUTION TO THE VICTIM $220 FOR CASH AND MEDALLION AND $1100 TOWFEE (TENTATIVE)/X:COURT RETAINS JURISDICITON RE RESTITUTION ISSUES,/SA1:NORIER RICK KESHISHAN/SAORD/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO PARTICIPATE AND COMPLETE 1 YEAR YOUNG MEN'S RE-ENTRY PROGRAM THROUGH INTENSIVE CASE MANAGEMENT/X:IF DEFENDANT COMPLETES 3 YEARS OF PROBATION AND 1 YEAR PROGRAM WITHOUT ANY VIOLATIONS OR REVOCATIONS, THE DEFT MAY WITHDRAW HIS GUILTY PLEA TO 211PC FELONYAND ENTER A NG PLEA ON 211PC AND PEOPLE WILL ADD A CHARGE OF 487(C)PC FELONY AND DEFT MAY PLEA GUILTY TO 487(C)PC AND 211PC WILL BE DISMISSSED AND WILL NOT COUNT AS A STRIKE,/ /WS/VF4:240/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA//COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/

/CAL:TRIAL, LD 05-07-12/AMEND:COUNT 1 TO READ AS A SECOND DEGREE ROBBERY AND NOT A FIRST DEGREE ROBBERY/FAW/IRR/ARBUCKLE/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 05-18-12/REPREQ:A:DATE:SN/TEXT/HEARFINDPLEA/DISPO/X:ESS;5 YEARS SP, UPPER TERM; PROB 3 Y; CTS AT TIME OF SENTENCING; WS;VF $240;LF;STAY AWAYFROM VICTIMS;RESTITUTION AS DETER BY APD;COMPLETE 1 YEAR INTENSIVE COUNSELING WITH YOUNG MENS RE-ENTRY; GUILTY PLEA TO THE 211PC AS A SECOND WILL BESET ASIDE NUNC PRO TUNC TO 04-27-12 AND ERASED AND CANNOT COUNT AS A STRIKE;IF THE DEFT SUCCESSFUL COMPLETES 3 YEARS OF PROBATION, PICKS UP NO NEW CASES, NO PROBATION VIOLATIONS; THE DEFENDANT WILL PLEA GUILTY TO THE 487CPC AS A FELONY/X:DNA; PC; PSR; PROBREVFN; COA $40; ICNA; FINE; BKFEE/ /X:HARVEY WAIVER AS TO 10028278,/DISM3/
